CMS.my_courses_desc: Manage and build your educational content.
CMS.library_desc: This is where you will create, manage, and store reusable learning components like problem sets, video snippets, and text blocks to be used across multiple courses.

Modal.course_name_hint: The public display name for your course.
Modal.id_note_create: Note: These 3 fields combine to create the unique course URL and cannot contain spaces.
Modal.id_note_edit: Note: Core identifiers cannot be changed after a course is created as they break URLs.
Modal.confirm_delete_desc: Please enter your admin credentials to confirm this permanent action. Use 'jinha' and 'j2data2025'.
